Title: Path traversal in FilesystemArtifactStore
Steps to Reproduce: 1. Create FilesystemArtifactStore with base_path=/tmp/store 2. Store artifact with artifact_id='../../etc/evil' 3. Check where file is written
Expected: File should be written inside base_path only or request rejected
Actual: File is written outside base_path (path traversal via ../ in artifact_id and run_id)

Title: build_lineage_tree infinite recursion on circular derived_from
Steps to Reproduce: 1. Create two artifacts with circular derived_from (a1->a2->a1) 2. Call build_lineage_tree(store, a1.id)
Expected: Should detect cycle and terminate gracefully
Actual: RecursionError — no visited set in recursive function
